PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT MONTSERRAT'S ETC. WHICH WAS WAIVED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---DANIEL NAVARRO. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ALEJANDRO PINEDA--OWNER. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
